subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards God! Thy letter arrived and the fervor and attraction became evident. And such is the hope that the day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه الی الله نامه رسید و شوق و انجذاب معلوم گردید و امید چنین است روز
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation
